statement: Why are trial users dropping off before completing onboarding?
notes: Look for friction in setup, integration, and first-session guidance.

statement: Why do new accounts say they cannot see value quickly enough?
notes: Track mentions of delayed outcomes, unclear workflows, and missing templates.

statement: What product and messaging issues make our pricing tiers feel confusing?
notes: Focus on feature gating confusion and unclear upgrade rationale.

statement: Why do customers escalate support tickets instead of self-serving in product?
notes: Look for broken help links, poor docs discoverability, and low confidence in AI support.

statement: What prevents high-usage free users from converting to paid plans?
notes: Watch for limits that feel arbitrary or missing premium feature clarity.
